privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Moodle course named CHEM101 containing 10 auto-generated test questions: 5 named with 'Atom_' prefix (Atom_01 through Atom_05) and 5 named with 'Bond_' prefix (Bond_01 through Bond_05). The agent must create two new question bank categories named 'Atomic Structure' and 'Chemical Bonding', then move the atom-prefixed questions into the first category and bond-prefixed questions into the second. All metadata values describing course name, category names, question prefixes, and quantity have been independently verified against the setup script, task description, and verifier logic.
